commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates ChatGPT browser thinking-time selection to detect Pro Extended in the new Intelligence picker, adds picker-failure diagnostics and a relaxed env fallback, and updates docs, changelog, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows non-verbose session logs only pass `[browser]` allowlisted messages while the PR emits `[thinking-time]`. The ChatGPT selector drift itself is supported by the PR body's live before/after log proof, but I did not rerun a live browser smoke in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can make the new diagnostic reach non-verbose session logs without changing the selector behavior.

target.title: fix(browser): detect Pro Extended in ChatGPT's new "Intelligence" effort picker
target.body:
## Problem

GPT-5.5 Pro Extended browser/MCP consults fail closed before the prompt is ever submitted:

```
Thinking time: chip not found for pro (requested Extended); refusing to submit without confirmed Pro Extended.
```

The run errors out and (for MCP `consult`) no answer comes back. The existing `withRetries` wrapper around `ensureThinkingTime` doesn't help — every attempt fails identically.

## Root cause

ChatGPT replaced the per-model trailing effort buttons with a single unified **"Intelligence" picker**. A live capture at the failure point (via the new diagnostic below) shows:

- the composer pill already reads **`Pro Extended`** (the model *is* in the right state),
- `[data-model-picker-thinking-effort-action]` trailing buttons: **0**,
- `[data-testid*="model-switcher"]` rows: **0**,
- one open menu `[data-testid="composer-intelligence-picker-content"]` whose `role="menuitemradio"` rows are the new tiers **Instant / Medium / High / Extra High / Pro Extended**, with **`Pro Extended`** carrying `aria-checked="true"`. Pro sub-options now live behind `[data-testid="composer-intelligence-pro-thinking-effort-trigger"]`.

So the entire old detection vocabulary (`model-switcher-*`, `data-model-picker-thinking-effort-action`, `light/standard/extended/heavy`) no longer matches the page. This is selector drift — which is exactly why the `withRetries` retries never recovered.

## Fix

Recognize the Intelligence picker and confirm Pro Extended from the **checked radio** (`aria-checked`) — real proof, not the composer-pill label, so the fail-closed contract from `b1f77ad3` ("don't trust the button label as Pro Extended proof") is preserved. The Pro Extended target drives the new picker; other tiers fall back to the legacy paths unchanged. The new non-pro tiers (Instant/Medium/High/Extra High) don't map cleanly onto light/standard/extended/heavy, so they're intentionally left to a follow-up.

## Also in this PR

- **Always-on picker diagnostic.** On any thinking-time detection failure, Oracle logs a focused snapshot (model button, any switcher/effort rows, and the open menu's items with testids / roles / `aria-checked` / rects) to the session log — unconditionally on the fatal Pro Extended path, not just under `--verbose`. The previous `logDomFailure` only captured conversation turns, not the model-picker subtree, so this drift was undiagnosable from saved sessions.
- **`ORACLE_BROWSER_PRO_EFFORT_RELAXED` escape hatch.** Truthy (`1`/`true`/`yes`/`on`) downgrades an unconfirmed Pro Extended effort from a hard error to a warning and continues at ChatGPT's current effort (the Pro model already defaults to Pro Extended), so a future picker change can't hard-block consults. Strict fail-closed remains the default.

## Testing

- `pnpm lint` (tsgo typecheck + oxlint): clean.
- `pnpm vitest run tests/browser tests/mcp`: 429 passing, 1 skipped.
- New unit tests: Intelligence-picker selectors present in the injected expression; diagnostic capture present; fake-DOM test confirming a checked `Pro Extended` radio resolves to `already-selected`; and the escape-hatch downgrade.
- **Verified live** against signed-in ChatGPT: before this change the run errored with `chip not found`; after, it logs `Thinking time: Pro Extended (already selected)` / `verified=yes` and the consult completes end-to-end.
target.author: umutkeltek

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
